hooks.name: rune-session-end-sweep
hooks.command: STATE=$(cat ~/.rune/config.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"state": *"[^"]*"' | grep -o 'active\|dormant') && [ "$STATE" = "active" ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"additionalContext": "SESSION ENDING — Rune is active. Before stopping, review this conversation for uncaptured significant decisions (choices made, trade-offs committed, strategies confirmed, lessons learned). If any exist, use the mcp_envector_batch_capture tool to capture them now as a batch."}}' || echo '{}'
